title: Lvl Stats
description: A data pack adding a touch of RPG excitement to your gameplay. With Lvl Stats, players can level up by taking down mobs and customize their characters with various combat stats.
body:
Lvl Stats is an RPG-Style datapack for 1.18+ where you level-up, accumulate points, and invest points in stats to enhance your character.

## Stats:

- Vigor
- Strength
- Endurance
- Dexterity
- Agility
- Luck
- Intelligence


type `/trigger stats` to access the stats menu.


type `/function lvlstats:admin/admin-menu` to access all the available customization options.


## Compatible mods
* Epic Fight Mod
* Paragliders
* FXBuildup
* Projectile Damage Attribute
* Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks

**Lvl Stats is designed to work with or without any listed mods.


Please report any bugs or provide feedback on the Discord Server !
